metadata.title: iMac14,2 OpenCore Legacy Patcher Compatibility
metadata.description: Review iMac14,2 OCLP planning notes, model support checks, GPU caveats, and official source links.

checker.title: iMac14,2 OCLP planning notes
checker.description: iMac14,2 is a frequent OCLP search because the exact GPU and wireless setup can affect upgrade risk.

items.question: Why does GPU matter on iMac OCLP planning?
items.answer: Graphics hardware affects acceleration, patch requirements, and which macOS version feels practical.

items.question: Is this an official iMac14,2 support page?
items.answer: No. It is an independent planning page that points back to official OCLP resources.
